# Content Pages Checklist

For `learn.html`, `insights.html`, and articles under `content/`.

```md
- [ ] Tone neutral, factual, **not financial advice**
- [ ] One H1; clean H2/H3 hierarchy
- [ ] TL;DR / key-takeaways block for long pieces
- [ ] Last-updated date visible AND accurate
- [ ] External claims cited (LBMA, World Gold Council, IMF, UAE Central Bank, etc.)
- [ ] No AI tone words ("delve", "unlock", "explore the world of", "in the realm of")
- [ ] Internal link to methodology + at least one calculator/tracker
- [ ] FAQ Q/A based on real search queries, not invented
- [ ] FAQ schema injected via `inject-schema.js` (not hand-authored)
- [ ] AR variant ships in same PR if EN/AR pair is on the plan
- [ ] OG image present
- [ ] Meta description hand-written, ≤ 160 chars, no keyword stuffing
- [ ] Reachable from a hub (learn index / insights index / footer)
```
